blockers.workaround: Resume with $gsd-resume-work or rerun $gsd-plan-phase 3 and choose discuss-phase first or continue without context.

decisions.decision: Phase 2 is complete and Phase 3 is the next active focus.
decisions.rationale: SAFE-01 through SAFE-06 are now closed by verify phase2 and host regressions.

decisions.decision: Phase 3 should start by locking fake-link/runtime proof boundaries before planning.
decisions.rationale: Without Phase 3 context, fake-link, sim, and observability scope can easily drift together.

next_action: Resume at the Phase 3 planning context gate and decide whether to run $gsd-discuss-phase 3 or continue planning without CONTEXT.md.
context_notes: Phase 2 execution and documentation are fully committed. I invoked $gsd-plan-phase 3, created the Phase 3 directory, and stopped before discuss/research/planning because there is no CONTEXT.md yet. No Phase 3 code or planning artifacts were created beyond the empty phase directory.
